productDisplayName: Oakley Men Fuel Cell Black Sunglasses
description: High on style, this pair of Fuel Cell sunglasses from oakley comes in a styled frame. An eclectic mixture of fashion and substance, its shape provides that perfect Fit over the root of your nose. The glasses come with a pair of removable caps for the nose holder. Housed in a velveteen pouch. Lens size: 59 mmLens colour: BlackFrame colour: BlackWarranty: 1 yearOakley Iridium leans coating to reduce glare and improve contrastStylised plastic frame in an aerodynamic design for absolute comfort and durabilityRectangle lens for absolute style and protection from the elementsBranding on sidesFlexible hinges for durabilityFixed nose holder with a thick bridge which is part of the frame to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skinCareRemove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth providedRemove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleanerDo not use your fingers on such stainsDo not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a car
